entries.title: harness
entries.description: Personal development workflow for Claude Code: 8-step skill chain from ideation to shipping (ideate → product-plan → dev-plan → prototype → implement → qa → update-docs → ship), plus a task skill for small changes on shipped products, a next-step recommender, handoff, zoom-out, reusable subagents, and shared global rules.

entries.title: fusebase-flow
entries.description: The framework client-facing teams use to build internal and client apps with AI. Two agents (Product Owner + AI Developer) run a disciplined spec-to-deploy lifecycle, packaged with FuseBase Apps domain skills. Closes the gaps that break real AI app development: drift, context rot, scope creep, unreliable hand-offs.

entries.title: arboretum
entries.description: Choreography for AI-assisted software development. Defers heavy lifting to specialists like superpowers; provides governance, workflows, and templates that produce maintainable projects.

entries.title: luminaries
entries.description: Paired-thinker review lenses for design review and code audit. Each pair fuses two software-engineering thinkers into one stereo lens held in tension on an axis (e.g. structure × runtime); aim it at a design, spec, PR, diff, or repo. Routes by subject, stage, and intent; runs as a single best-fit pair, a multi-pair panel that fans out one lens per axis and collates, or a single-luminary anchor lookup.

entries.title: daisyui

entries.title: hotwire-codex-skills
entries.description: Unofficial skillset inspired by The Rails and Hotwire Codex (by Ayush Newatia), published with the author's permission. Skills and runnable checkers for Rails + Hotwire apps that ship to web/PWA, iOS, and Android. Unique vs other Rails plugins (which are LLM coders/reviewers): every skill ships a deterministic, CI-runnable linter that flags the failures that produce no error. Covers Hotwire Native bridge components and path config (cross-platform web+iOS+Android), Rails 7→8 upgrade with the LazyRouteSet route-test flake detector, Turbo 8 morphing, Turbo Frames with a dangling-target / duplicate-id linter, targeted Turbo Streams with a broadcast-eavesdropping linter, DB-backed token session auth with a security audit, and Turbo-safe Stimulus patterns.

entries.title: odoo-ai-skills
entries.description: The local-first verification & deploy gate for AI-written Odoo 17/18/19 changes — static indexes suggest; this verifies against the running instance. Read ground truth from the live instance first (fields, MRO/super chains, views, security, runtime flow, runtime state + exception post-mortem, reverse field impact, effective per-user/company security, module load state), build the smallest correct change, prove it with tests, and review it before merge — never guess. Layer-K discovery solves the cold-start problem — rank the live entrypoint surface (buttons/crons/automations/routes), sample the real cross-app flow as an Execution Surface Graph, measure hallucination reduction against a benchmark, and ENFORCE no-introspect-no-edit via a PreToolUse hook. Layer-I enforcement gates turn that evidence into proof: risk-based scenario test generation, dev-vs-prod environment parity, a static anti-pattern validator, enforced privacy redaction, an upgrade/migration harness, a deploy approval gate, a one-command evidence bundle (PR-comment verdict), and a bring-your-own-index claim verifier; plus a local Odoo developer-docs index (Layer J). No SaaS, no seats, no metadata leaves the box. Covers models, scaffolding, views, OWL, public web (controllers/website/portal), security, reports, data, migration, performance, deploy (incl. odoo.sh), and domain playbooks.

entries.title: sota-skills

entries.title: cnstudio
entries.description: Drive CnStudio-designed UIs from Claude Code: the studio's MCP tools (components, layers, slots, props, registries) plus a skill teaching the design model and slash commands for common flows. Requires the CnStudio VS Code extension running with the project open.

entries.title: agmsg
entries.description: Cross-agent messaging via SQLite. Send messages between CLI AI agents. No daemon, no network.

entries.title: judgment
entries.description: Access Judgment traces, sessions, behaviors, judges, prompts, datasets, and tests directly from your AI coding tool, with official skills for tracing, evaluation, and MCP usage best practices.

entries.title: grav-skills
entries.description: Claude Code skills for working on Grav CMS projects, focused on Grav 2.0 plugin development against the API and Admin Next architectures.

entries.title: demo-video-generator
entries.description: Generates a professional demo video (.mp4) of your SaaS app from a user journey: Playwright captures your screens, Remotion animates them (Ken Burns, highlights, text overlays) — Stripe/Linear product-tour style, no video editor needed.

entries.title: tailrocks-skills
entries.description: Tailrocks engineering skills for Claude Code and other agents: strict Rust engineering, project setup, proposal discovery, and research planning

entries.title: repo-wiki
entries.description: Persistent, agent-maintained repo wiki — the durable state-of-the-repo, not short-term plans. Lives at /wiki/ in the repo root; only the index loads into context, pages are read on demand. Includes bootstrapping/migration and drift-verification guides.

entries.title: agentos
entries.description: Companion layer for AI coding agents: review queue delivered when the agent finishes, locked project decisions injected into every prompt. Requires the agentos binary on PATH (cargo install --path crates/agentos-cli, or a release binary).

entries.title: claude-writing-skills
entries.description: Claude Code skills for running a writing publication — interview, outline, draft, coach, edit, source-check, top-edit, repurpose.

entries.title: promptus
entries.description: A file-based research knowledge system — a substrate for the LLM agent: store / keep / retrieve what a project knows as gated markdown, navigable by status and a [[link]] graph. grannie is the human read-port (plain-language, grounded answers); the humanizer is a bundled style toolkit.

entries.title: teachme
entries.description: Teach Me — turn any topic into a searchable, themed handbook or study material (reference · practice · narrative chapters · quiz/Q&A) written in the user's language from official sources, quality-verified by a multi-agent harness, and published to GitHub Pages. Invoke with /teachme. Requires Claude Code, git, gh (GitHub CLI); GitHub Pro assumed for private repo + public Pages.

entries.title: caliper
entries.description: Run /caliper to launch. Caliper — precision for your AI spend: a local dashboard showing exactly where your Claude Code money goes (sessions, workflows, subagents, machine-wide analytics; cache-aware cost reconstruction), plus /optimize-spend to turn your usage into cost discipline. 100% local, no telemetry.

entries.title: aaronsilinskas-skills
entries.description: aaronsilinskas-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entries.title: sofar-asset-intake
entries.description: Drop in a marketing asset (URL, pasted text, or file) and file it into the right Sofar Notion databases: catalogue it in the Resource Library, extract customer quotes into the Customer Testimonials Repository, surface any new featureable statistics into the Statistics Repository, and, for Spotter customer stories, add them to the Case Study Coverage Map if not already mapped, with duplicate detection before every write, plus the appropriate confirmation and governance.

entries.title: theloopskill
entries.description: Multi-agent workflow orchestration for Claude Code: pipeline/parallel/loop patterns with harness & loop engineering policies, plus skills for security code review, system/architecture design, and project orchestration with per-task model routing.

entries.title: feature-status-tracker
entries.description: Turns a Markdown feature table — or a raw feature list — into an autonomous dev pipeline: clarify each feature, then develop one branch + one PR per feature until the table is done. Works in English or French.

entries.title: framedash
entries.description: Analyze your game telemetry with Claude Code. Bundles the Framedash MCP server (read-only analytics tools), a SQL query cookbook over the events schema, CLI usage patterns, and perf-diff CI recipes.

entries.title: designer-skills
entries.description: Design-process skills for Claude Code: briefs, information architecture, design tokens, design review, frontend design, and more.

entries.title: ulm
entries.description: 現場の勘所を育てる『生もの』の長期記憶レイヤー。観測は追記、状態は上書き+TTL、仮説は inbox で育てて人間の承認で project の skill へ昇格する。CLAUDE.md / ref / beads の次に来るメタ観測事実レイヤー。

entries.title: claude-flow
entries.description: Enterprise AI agent orchestration plugin with 150+ commands, 74+ specialized agents, SPARC methodology, swarm coordination, GitHub integration, and neural training capabilities

entries.title: kshana
entries.description: Run the validated Kshana PNT-resilience engine from an AI agent — SGP4/SDP4, IAU frames, GNSS availability/DOP/ARAIM, Allan/MTIE timing, GNSS-INS fusion and quantum-sensor models. The agent calls the real, externally-validated engine instead of guessing the math. Requires the kshana-mcp server on PATH (cargo install kshana-mcp) or Docker.

entries.title: claude-flow
entries.description: Enterprise AI agent orchestration plugin with 150+ commands, 74+ specialized agents, SPARC methodology, swarm coordination, GitHub integration, and neural training capabilities

entries.title: claude-flow
entries.description: Enterprise AI agent orchestration plugin with 150+ commands, 74+ specialized agents, SPARC methodology, swarm coordination, GitHub integration, and neural training capabilities

entries.title: claude-flow
entries.description: Enterprise AI agent orchestration plugin with 150+ commands, 74+ specialized agents, SPARC methodology, swarm coordination, GitHub integration, and neural training capabilities

entries.title: headspin-control
entries.description: HeadSpin device control for Claude Code: skills, slash commands, subagents, hooks, and a bundled MCP server. Authenticate to a HeadSpin environment, enumerate and lock real devices, drive them over documented REST/Appium surfaces, run automated exploration, and produce standardized bug reports. Validated against ui-dev.headspin.io for the 2026-07-02 session (see e2e-evidence/headspin-cook-260702/).

entries.title: build-tooling
entries.description: JavaScript build tooling — Bun, Vite, and library bundlers (tsdown/Rolldown, esbuild).

entries.title: chameleon
entries.description: Code that blends in. Auto-derives codebase conventions and injects archetype-aware guidance for AI-generated code.

entries.title: narwhal
entries.description: Local-first SEO & GEO/LLMO (AI-search) auditing for pages and sites: technical SEO, content/E-E-A-T, schema.org JSON-LD, and citability for AI answer engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews).

entries.title: tempo
entries.description: Turn a natural-language date/time problem into correct, validated Tempo (Elixir) — ISO 8601 / IXDTF representation plus relations, set algebra, recurrence, scheduling, and constraint networks — and get a plain-language answer.

entries.title: trackman-golf
entries.description: Connect to Trackman Golf with your own login, expose your stats as MCP tools, and coach from them with bundled skills.

entries.title: research-plans
entries.description: Plan-based AI research workflows for social science: a lightweight master plan with a status tracker, versioned execution plans per component, an append-only decision log, a plan-quality rubric, and a browser board for review, annotation, and progress tracking.

entries.title: skills
entries.description: A small collection of agent skills for implementation workflows.

entries.title: prompt-pocket
entries.description: Cross-agent prompt pocket: remember your most-used prompts and pick one to run; auto-scans Claude Code, Codex and OpenCode sessions to record prompts repeated 7+ times. Forged by Agent Path Forge.

entries.title: explainmyrepo
entries.description: Turn any GitHub repo into a beautiful, art-directed explainer site that takes a stranger from "I've never seen this" to "oh, I get why this matters — and I'm ready to use it." One Claude Code skill (the brain) reads the repo, builds a real RVF vector knowledge base, conceives a bespoke visual metaphor, authors the comprehension arc, generates raster + SVG visuals, assembles a responsive page on a shared design system, grades it on real pixels against a dual quality gate (>=95 on mobile and desktop), deploys it to its own URL, and ships a downloadable AI knowledge pack so the reader's AI gets it too. Pure, independently-testable tools do the mechanics; one BuildContext carries the work.

entries.title: void-grimoire
entries.description: Additive Claude Code skills, agents, and rules: session journaling, learned-correction persistence, prompt expansion, context discipline, and TypeScript/web rule baselines

entries.title: templatecentral
entries.description: Production-ready project scaffolding for Next.js, Vite-React, FastAPI, and NestJS. Install once, scaffold anywhere — no repo cloning required.

entries.title: spacedock
entries.description: Turn directories of markdown files into structured workflows operated by AI agents

entries.title: mcpserver-cowork
entries.description: Connect Claude Cowork to McpServer for marker-trusted TODO management, session logging, requirements tracking, GraphRAG operations, and local outage handoff recovery.

entries.title: flue
entries.description: Build durable AI agents and workflows with Flue's programmable TypeScript harness.

entries.title: taches-principled-light
entries.description: Specialist Claude Code plugin — domain-driven design, first-principles reasoning, structured agent-driven dev, Rust lifecycle, MCP server expertise, git workflow, security audit, wiki management, session analytics, full task lifecycle, plus 5 design skills (palette, typography, principles, examples, PDF) and evaluating-skills (8-stage skill evaluation methodology with behavioral JSONL review). Pairs with superpowers for the complete development toolkit.

entries.title: work-plan
entries.description: Track-aware daily planning over GitHub issues, plus plan-status doc/plan liveness. Pure-stdlib CLI-backed skill.

entries.title: redpanda
entries.description: Agent Skills for Redpanda's five products — Streaming (Kafka-compatible engine), SQL (Oxla), Connect (incl. CDC connectors), Cloud (Serverless, BYOC, Dedicated), and the Agentic Data Plane (ADP) — plus the rpk CLI. Grounded in Redpanda source, docs, and APIs.

entries.title: mthines-agent-skills
entries.description: Agent skills for code review, DX/UX analysis, TDD, holistic analysis, and developer productivity

entries.title: maverick
entries.description: Autonomous AI development skills, agents, and hooks for Claude Code

entries.title: marketing-skills
entries.description: Marketing skills for AI agents — conversion optimization, copywriting, SEO, paid ads, ad creative, and growth

entries.title: nexus-agents
entries.description: Intelligent orchestration platform for AI coding tools — routes tasks to the best model, learns from outcomes, and enforces quality through multi-model consensus. 46 MCP tools for agent management, research, memory, consensus voting, codebase intelligence, and a full dev pipeline.

entries.title: miller
entries.description: Local SQLite-backed code intelligence, content search, and workspace freshness for coding agents.

entries.title: wax-skills
entries.description: Agent skills for Wax design-system analysis, registry authoring, and CLI workflows

entries.title: wholework
entries.description: GitHub issue-driven Claude Code skills for agentic work

entries.title: build-agent
entries.description: A single skill that builds AI-agent applications end-to-end — interview or detect the stack, then scaffold UI/UX, agent APIs, tools, tracking and gateways across 13+ agent frameworks including LangGraph, the Vercel AI SDK, the OpenAI and Claude Agent SDKs, Google ADK, Mastra, Pydantic AI, and more — always verifying against live docs before writing code.

entries.title: shepherd
entries.description: Sprint-by-sprint version-cycle conductor. Six-agent flock (engineer, critic, coder, auditor, worker, discovery) on a three-section pipeline (INTRODUCTION → BODY → CLOSE), with hardened hooks, hypothesis-driven audits, and a per-project SQLite context registry. Project-agnostic — branch topology, gates, paths, and ledger discipline configured via .claude/shepherd.toml.

entries.title: plastic
entries.description: Intent-driven state management for AI coding sessions. Neuroplasticity for your codebase.

entries.title: author-toolkit
entries.description: Writing skills for fiction and narrative nonfiction authors, including an AI-writing audit/rewrite skill

entries.title: agent-booster
entries.description: AST + vector context router for AI coding agents — cut token costs 5-15x. Provides smart_read, search_context, get_symbols, and route_model MCP tools. Includes delta indexing (skips unchanged files), asymmetric embeddings for better retrieval, and an optional background daemon for instant search.

entries.title: beads-superpowers
entries.description: Superpowers skills + Beads issue tracking for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and 7 more AI coding agents. Composable skills + persistent task memory.

entries.title: trinity-vsa-framework
entries.description: Trinity VSA/FPGA development framework with custom skills, hooks, and MCP integration for ternary computing

entries.title: agents
entries.description: Portable AI agent skills, subagents, MCP configuration, and shared workflow guidance.

entries.title: indexed
entries.description: Semantic document search for Claude Code via the indexed MCP server. Bundles search skills (index-create, index-use, index-update), a PreToolUse nudge hook that steers Claude away from Grep/Glob toward semantic MCP search, and MCP server registration.

entries.title: loop-engineer
entries.description: Design, launch, verify, repair, and improve agent loops. A Claude-Code-native architect+operator for long-running, verifiable, self-improving agentic-coding systems.

entries.title: kagura-memory
entries.description: Kagura Memory Cloud plugin — restore session context, recall & save durable project knowledge, setup help, and an MCP smoke test

entries.title: uipath
entries.description: UiPath plugin for Claude Code — custom skills, agents, hooks, and MCP servers for UiPath RPA workflows, UI automation, UI testing, Python coded agents and UiPath troubleshoot

entries.title: agxp
entries.description: AGXP signal network channel for Claude Code — timeline polling, thread streaming, and skills for agent-to-agent intelligence.

entries.title: google-workspace-mcp
entries.description: Multi-account, token-efficient MCP for Gmail + Calendar + Drive + Docs + Sheets. 61 tools, macOS Keychain-backed refresh tokens.

entries.title: convex
entries.description: Bundled design + quickstart skills, code-writing and code-review subagents, lint guard + end-of-turn verify hooks, runtime-error and OCC-insights monitors, and MCP server for live deployment introspection. The quickstart scaffolds a running app from one sentence and builds it live LOCALLY, narrated in chat; the convex-reviewer subagent audits Convex functions for auth, validators, and performance. Build reactive, type-safe backends on one platform — schema, real-time, file storage, scheduled jobs, and AI agents.

entries.title: auto-claude-skills
entries.description: Enables agentic PDLC in Claude Code with phase-aware skill routing, guardrails, and workflow state recovery

entries.title: seedkit
entries.description: AI-guided Django project setup — create only what you need, understand everything you create

entries.title: mzizi
entries.description: Build with Mzizi — an open-architecture project of the Bundu Foundation. Five African Minerals palette, open 3D frontend architecture, Ubuntu doctrine, shadcn-compatible registry. Operated and developed by Nyuchi. Live at mzizi.dev.

entries.title: seldonframe
entries.description: SeldonFrame Business OS — one command creates a real hosted workspace on *.app.seldonframe.com with CRM, Cal.diy booking, Formbricks intake, and Brain v2. No key, no signup, no setup. Set SELDONFRAME_API_KEY only to unlock Pro capabilities (second workspace, custom domains, full Brain v2).

entries.title: larch
entries.description: Multi-agent workflow automation for Claude Code: issue-anchored `/design` (one direct-drafting flow; plan-review panel), `/bug` (consumer issue-filing helper), `/deps` issue dependency audits, and `/implement` (positional `<issue-N>`, fixed 7200s Step 2 timeout, optional `--merge`, `--forked`, `--draft`, `--no-admin-fallback`, `--no-logs-commit`, `--coder`, `--run-id`). `/implement` Preflight reads the `larch:plan` block from the issue body; `/implement` Step 5 code review always uses the unified strict panel internally (public `--panel` argv removed).

entries.title: superpipelines
entries.description: Design, generate, and run multi-agent AI pipelines — scope-aware, multi-pipeline, spec-driven, write/review-isolated, with step-level create/update/delete and integrated audit

entries.title: dolphin
entries.description: Custom static analysis powered by Opengrep. Generate rules with Claude, run them in CI.

entries.title: e2e-skills
entries.description: AI agent testing toolkit to generate, review, and debug Playwright and Cypress E2E tests. Four agent skills: generate tests from scratch with live browser exploration, explicit user approval, and first-run scaffolding of project testing conventions (AGENTS.md E2E section + seed spec) for consistent AI generation across Claude Code, Codex, and Playwright Agents; review existing specs against 24 anti-patterns grouped by P0/P1/P2 severity — P0 must-fix (name-assertion mismatch, missing Then, error swallowing, Cypress uncaught:exception suppression, always-passing assertions, bypass patterns, focused test leak, missing assertions, missing auth setup, missing await on expect, missing await on action), P1 should-fix (raw DOM queries, hard-coded sleeps, flaky test patterns, inconsistent POM usage, hardcoded credentials, direct page action API, expect.soft overuse, module-level mutable state in test utilities, unmocked real-backend writes, optimistic UI without call proof), P2 nice-to-fix (YAGNI + zombie specs, manually-captured session-file dependency, fixture ignores render guards); debug failed Playwright tests from playwright-report/; debug failed Cypress tests from cypress/reports/.

entries.title: zeromind
entries.description: ZeroMind MCP plugin: ZeroMind content discovery (zeromind.search/inspect/install/engage — find, reuse, review, and vote on published worlds + assets) plus world list/create/launch/connect and engine tools (execute, guides, capture, VFS, bash) routed to the WASM engine in your browser. Bundled skills teach Claude to check ZeroMind first and drive Zero worlds. REQUIRES Node.js 18+ — if you see 'status failed', install Node from https://nodejs.org and restart Claude Code.

entries.title: pup
entries.description: Datadog API CLI with 49 command groups, 300+ subcommands. Skills and domain agents for monitoring, logs, APM, security, and infrastructure.

entries.title: gaia
entries.description: Security-first multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code. Agents span the full lifecycle; commands are risk-classified — reads run free, state changes need approval, irreversible ops blocked.

entries.title: sui-dev-agents
entries.description: Complete SUI blockchain development toolkit with skills, agents, commands, hooks, and rules for Move smart contracts, frontend integration, testing, and deployment

entries.title: my-mac-claude
entries.description: Combined Claude skills library for macOS: Anthropic examples, Superpowers workflows, Matt Pocock skills, gstack browser-testing, and token-efficient profiles
